title: Canonical operator snapshot wrapper binding
goal: Version, release-bind, install and test the Leitstand operator snapshot launcher so Bureau task truth is consumed only from the canonical digest-validated runtime registry snapshot while the format bridge is loaded from the same immutable Leitstand release.

acceptance.assertion: The operator snapshot launcher is versioned in Leitstand, sealed as a critical release artifact, and resolves the format bridge from the same immutable release rather than a mutable checkout.
acceptance.verifier: release manifest, diff and runtime review

acceptance.assertion: Bureau task truth is accepted only from the canonical runtime snapshot named by the Bureau deployment manifest and bound to source commit, inventory SHA-256 and complete registry-tree SHA-256.
acceptance.verifier: wrapper tests and live verify-only receipt

acceptance.assertion: Tampered files, undeclared task files, symlink path components and snapshot-root escapes fail closed before artifact generation.
The host-local launcher is installed atomically from a successfully verified immutable release and its SHA-256 matches the release artifact exactly.
The real Leitstand operator snapshot producer completes successfully with the installed wrapper and emits source-binding evidence for its Leitstand release and canonical Bureau snapshot.
acceptance.verifier: systemd service status and journal readback

acceptance.assertion: The wrapper adds no Bureau or Grabowski mutation, task dispatch or source repair path and continues to write only Leitstand-local snapshot artifacts.
acceptance.verifier: diff, observer invariant and live route review

metadata.candidate_reconciliation: The referenced historical follow-up candidate is no longer present in the current typed Bureau intake, and LOO-V1-T009 was absent from fresh origin/main before registration. The task was reconstructed from prior evidence, implemented and verified before canonical closeout.

validation.self_review: PASS; final review closed undeclared-task, symlink-component and TOCTOU reread gaps before merge.
validation.github_checks: All current PR #182 checks passed before merge: CI build, CodeQL, ai-context guards, security hygiene and Cloudflare Pages.

verified_acceptance.versioned-release-wrapper: Leitstand PR #182 versions scripts/leitstand-export-operator-snapshots, adds it to CRITICAL_ARTIFACTS, and resolves export-operator-snapshots.mjs from the same immutable release.
verified_acceptance.canonical-bureau-snapshot-binding: The installed wrapper validated the Bureau deployment manifest, source commit 1a5f68e7..., inventory SHA-256 and full registry-tree SHA-256 before any producer write path.
verified_acceptance.fail-closed-input-integrity: Six focused tests cover valid binding plus tampered tree, snapshot-root escape, undeclared task injection and symlink-component failures; queue and task JSON are consumed from the exact bytes used for the verified tree digest.
verified_acceptance.exact-installed-release-bytes: The host wrapper was atomically replaced only after successful release deployment and independent verification; installed and release SHA-256 both equal 165afd91cf4609b800a26fa65e56edb5b4d3c811ef95cb3002cd44ceaadb94f0.
verified_acceptance.live-producer-success: leitstand-operator-snapshots.service completed successfully with the installed wrapper and emitted structured source-binding evidence for Leitstand release 550ee75... and the canonical Bureau snapshot.
verified_acceptance.read-only-boundary: Observer-Invariant-Guard passed; the wrapper reads Bureau and Grabowski state, performs no task dispatch or source repair, and only writes temporary raw inputs plus Leitstand-local output artifacts through the existing bridge.
